ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.summary: This is the repository for the Sea-Bird Scientific (SBS) Community Toolkit
This is the repository for the Sea-Bird Scientific (SBS) Community Toolkit

name: seabirdscientific
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "seabirdscientific" %}
{% set version = "2.7.9" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/{{ name[0] }}/{{ name }}/seabirdscientific-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 0067273c343835434f05b78261c2b69a82c4fd4cc63bff5402e9e102c384bbcb

build:
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation
  number: 0

requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - setuptools >=61
    - pip
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}
    - gsw >=3.6.20,<3.7.dev0
    - matplotlib-base >=3.9.4,<3.10.dev0
    - numpy >=2.0.2,<2.1.dev0
    - pandas >=2.3.3,<2.4.dev0
    - plotly >=6.3.1,<6.4.dev0
    - scipy >=1.13.1,<1.14.dev0
    # - ruff 
    # - python-build 
    # - pytest-cov 
    # - pytest 
    # - notebook 
    # - nbformat 
    # - nbconvert 
    # - kaleido 
    # - ruff 
    # - python-build 
    # - pytest-cov 
    # - pytest

    # - nbformat

    # - notebook 
    # - nbformat 
    # - nbconvert 
    # - kaleido 
    # - ruff 
    # - python-build 
    # - pytest-cov

    # - notebook 
    # - nbformat 
    # - nbconvert

    # - ruff

    # - kaleido 

test:
  imports:
    - seabirdscientific
  commands:
    - pip check
  requires:
    - pip
    - python {{ python_min }}

about:
  home: https://github.com/Sea-BirdScientific/seabirdscientific
  license: MIT
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: 'This is the repository for the Sea-Bird Scientific (SBS) Community Toolkit'
  doc_url: https://github.com/Sea-BirdScientific/seabirdscientific/tree/main/documentation
  dev_url: https://github.com/Sea-BirdScientific/seabirdscientific/

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - darynwhite
